Mechanical Design Engineer · Additive Manufacturing

Nihal
Nigam

Product Design  ·  3D Modeling  ·  Design for Manufacturing

Crafting precision-engineered designs from concept to production-ready reality. IndiaSkills 2025-26 Medallion of Excellence winner in Additive Manufacturing. Delivering OEM-grade structural solutions for Ashok Leyland, EKA Mobility & beyond.

Connect on LinkedIn View Projects

01 — About

Engineer by passion,
precision by nature

I'm a mechanical design engineer specialising in structural product design, additive manufacturing, and DFM-ready drafting. At Sanatan Bus Body Builder I independently designed the full structural body of a prototype bus for Ashok Leyland — completing the entire CAD model in just 3 weeks from chassis arrival and seeing it physically fabricated.

As a freelancer with EKA Mobility I engineered purpose-built logistics trolleys for their electric bus production line. I've also explored acoustic privacy furniture as an independent design project. A proud IndiaSkills 2025-26 Medallion of Excellence winner in Additive Manufacturing.

I bring competitive precision and a constant drive to deliver production-ready solutions aligned with OEM standards and real-world manufacturing constraints.

03 — Experience

Professional History

Apr 2025 – Jun 2025
Indore, M.P.
Sanatan Bus Body Builder
Jr. Design Engineer
  • Designed complete bus body structure prototype for Ashok Leyland using Creo & SolidWorks — full CAD model in 3 weeks from chassis arrival.
  • Led entire CAD development: structural layout, component integration, model optimisation for manufacturability.
  • Collaborated with manufacturing team through paneling, plywood fitting and ABS installation.
  • Prepared complete BOM per ZEDBC standards; design directly used in physical fabrication.

  • Delivered 3D models (PVZ & STP) for accurate manufacturing and client review.

04 — Projects

Selected Work

01 · Sanatan Bus Body Builder × Ashok Leyland
Bus Body Prototype — Wheelbase 4900mm
Complete structural body design for a 4900mm wheelbase prototype bus for Ashok Leyland. Sole designer — from 3D CAD model to DFM-compliant 2D drawings and ZEDBC-standard BOM. Design went directly to fabrication; physical prototype successfully built in just 3 weeks.
Creo ParametricSolidWorksDFMZEDBC BOMStructural DesignPrototype Fabrication
CAD Model — Creo Parametric · Full Structural Assembly
CAD Model — Side Elevation · Structural Frame Detail
CAD Model — Top View · Roof Structure Layout
Fabrication · Steel Frame — Initial Structure Raised
Fabrication · Full Frame Side Profile
Fabrication · Interior Roof Frame Structure
Fabrication · Roof Arch Structure — Interior View
Assembly · Front Panel & Body Skin Fitting
Assembly · Panelling & Window Frame Integration
Completed Prototype · Production-Ready Ashok Leyland Bus
1 / 10
02
EKA Mobility — Logistics Trolleys
Multi-variant logistics trolleys for electric bus component handling — rear wall panels and seat boxes. Full parametric 3D models with step-by-step 2D manufacturing drawings. Delivered for EV production line at Chakan, Maharashtra.
CreoParametric 3D2D DraftingEV Industry
03 · Freelance
Acoustic Privacy Chair
A freelance industrial design project exploring acoustic privacy seating — three distinct forms: a cone pod chair, an organic shell lounge, and a capsule pod. Each addresses personal acoustic shielding in open-plan environments. Designed & rendered in SolidWorks.
SolidWorksSurfacingIndustrial DesignRendering
